panic.text: Oh no. Oh no no no. Captain, there is a NEBULA ahead. It's enormous. It's beautiful. It's... probably a cloud. But what do we DO?

through-good.text: WE'RE IN THE NEBULA. It's... fine. It's completely fine. I touched it with a sensor. Logging this as the bravest thing we've ever done.

through-weird.text: We're through! Minor note: all our readings now display in an unknown language, and the ship smells faintly of cinnamon. Investigating. Probably forever.

around.text: Going around. The nebula watched us the whole way. Science is writing a poem about it. We couldn't stop them.

calm.text: You're right. Deep breaths. It's just interstellar gas and dust and majesty. I'm calm now. I'm going to name it Gerald.

drift.text: The nebula has drifted astern. I panicked for nothing. This changes nothing about future panics.
